LanguageData.ArmorRating_Sharp.description:
Mitigation effect against sharp attacks, such as bullets, stabs, slashes, scratches and bites.

When a sharp attack meets armor, this rating is used to reduce the attack's penetration and damage, the stopped part of the attack decaying into a blunt attack. As the armor rating increases, more of the sharp attack is converted into a blunt one, until the rating exceeds the penetration amount and the attack fully decays into a blunt one. For example, a sharp attack with 10 mm RHA penetration after 8 mm RHA of armor keeps 20% of its damage and penetration, with 80% of its blunt penetration being used for a residual blunt attack.

The reduction effect applies per layer, with each layer (including natural armor) decaying the sharp attack into a blunt one until the attack pierces through all layers or fully decays.

This rating also doubles as an armor's resistance against being damaged by sharp attacks. Hard armors (armor vests, full plate) take more damage the closer a sharp attack's penetration amount is to the armor rating, whereas soft armors (parkas, dusters) take the amount of damage stopped or at least 20% of the attack's damage. The damage and penetration reduction per layer also affects armor damage, with upper layers reducing the damage inner layers take.

The internal formulas used:
 - For reducing a sharp attack's damage and penetration per layer:
 Remaining_Sharp_Penetration = Max(0, Sharp_Penetration - Sharp_Armor_Rating)
 Sharp_Damage = Sharp_Damage * Remaining_Sharp_Penetration / Sharp_Penetration
 Sharp_Penetration = Remaining_Sharp_Penetration

 - For the residual blunt attack's damage and penetration:
 Stopped_Sharp_Penetration = Intial_Sharp_Penetration - Final_Sharp_Penetration
 Blunt_Penetration = Blunt_Penetration * Stopped_Sharp_Penetration / Intial_Sharp_Penetration
 Blunt_Damage = (Blunt_Penetration * 10) ^ (1 / 3)
LanguageData.ArmorRating_Blunt.description:
Mitigation effect against blunt attacks, such as punches, mace swings, explosions and animal hoofs.

When a blunt attack meets armor, this rating is used to reduce the attack's penetration and damage. As the armor rating increases, more of the blunt attack is reduced, until the rating exceeds the penetration amount and the attack is completely stopped. For example, a blunt attack with 10 MPa after 8 MPa of armor keeps 20% of its damage and penetration.

The reduction effect applies per layer, with each layer (including natural armor) reducing the blunt attack until it travels through all layers or is completely stopped.

This rating also doubles as an armor's resistance against being damaged by blunt attacks. Hard armors (armor vests, full plate) take more damage the closer a blunt attack's penetration amount is to the armor rating, whereas soft armors (parkas, dusters) take no damage. The damage and penetration reduction per layer also affects armor damage, with upper layers reducing the damage inner layers take.

The internal formula used for reducing a blunt attack's damage and penetration per layer:
 Remaining_Blunt_Penetration = Max(0, Blunt_Penetration - Blunt_Armor_Rating)
 Blunt_Damage = Blunt_Damage * Remaining_Blunt_Penetration / Blunt_Penetration
 Blunt_Penetration = Remaining_Blunt_Penetration
LanguageData.ArmorRating_Heat.description: Percentage reduction of attack damage from extreme heat or cold, such as fire, incendiary explosions, or frostbite-inflicting attacks.\n\nThe total across all sources of this armor is added for a protected part, then reduced by the armor reduction value of the incoming attack. If the resulting value is 100% or greater, protected parts of the pawn will be immune to the incoming attack's hot or cold damage.
LanguageData.ShootingAccuracyPawn.label: weapon handling
LanguageData.ShootingAccuracyPawn.description:
How well a shooter can hold a gun steady when aiming and compensate for recoil.

The total sway is calculated as:
(4.5 - weapon handling) * weapon sway factor

The recoil per shot is determined by multiplying this value against the weapon's inherent recoil amount and increases after every shot in a burst.
